title: [Sylinar's Spire, Laboratory]
description: Cool air spills through shuttered windows set deep into the stone, their panels drawn wide to reveal the frost-bound landscape of Summit Academy.  Long worktables crowd the space, cluttered with glass alembics, stained vials, and scorched instruments marked by years of trial.  At one end, a low hearth, when lit, aids in pushing back the deep chill of the air that seeps through the open windows.  Covering the stone floor, a worn rug lies mottled with old burns and faint chemical stains.
